model.sql:
WITH g15a_ai_query_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    subject_text,
    description_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g15a_ai_query_prompted AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    subject_text,
    description_text,
    concat(
      'Classify the request and summarize the next best action in 40 words. Subject: ',
      coalesce(subject_text, ''),
      '. Description: ',
      coalesce(description_text, '')
    ) AS prompt_text
  FROM g15a_ai_query_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  subject_text,
  description_text,
  ai_query(
    '<serving_endpoint_name>',
    prompt_text
  ) AS ai_response
FROM g15a_ai_query_prompted

WITH g15b_ai_gen_source AS (
  SELECT
    product_id,
    product_name,
    product_benefit
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  product_id,
  product_name,
  product_benefit,
  ai_gen(
    concat(
      'Write a concise product headline for ',
      coalesce(product_name, 'the product'),
      ' that emphasizes this benefit: ',
      coalesce(product_benefit, 'key business value')
    )
  ) AS generated_headline
FROM g15b_ai_gen_source

WITH g15c_ai_summarize_source AS (
  SELECT
    review_id,
    long_form_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  review_id,
  long_form_text,
  ai_summarize(long_form_text, 50) AS summary_text
FROM g15c_ai_summarize_source

WITH g15d_ai_translate_source AS (
  SELECT
    message_id,
    message_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  message_id,
  message_text,
  ai_translate(message_text, '<target_language_code>') AS translated_text
FROM g15d_ai_translate_source

WITH g15e_ai_classify_source AS (
  SELECT
    interaction_id,
    interaction_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  interaction_id,
  interaction_text,
  ai_classify(
    interaction_text,
    array('billing_issue', 'technical_issue', 'sales_request', 'other')
  ) AS interaction_class
FROM g15e_ai_classify_source

WITH g15f_ai_extract_source AS (
  SELECT
    interaction_id,
    note_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g15f_ai_extract_entities AS (
  SELECT
    interaction_id,
    note_text,
    ai_extract(
      note_text,
      array('person', 'organization', 'email', 'phone')
    ) AS entities
  FROM g15f_ai_extract_source
)
SELECT
  interaction_id,
  note_text,
  entities.person AS extracted_person,
  entities.organization AS extracted_organization,
  entities.email AS extracted_email,
  entities.phone AS extracted_phone
FROM g15f_ai_extract_entities

WITH g15g_ai_mask_source AS (
  SELECT
    interaction_id,
    note_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  interaction_id,
  note_text,
  ai_mask(
    note_text,
    array('person', 'email', 'phone', 'address')
  ) AS masked_note_text
FROM g15g_ai_mask_source

WITH g15h_ai_similarity_source AS (
  SELECT
    query_id,
    candidate_id,
    search_text,
    candidate_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  query_id,
  candidate_id,
  search_text,
  candidate_text,
  ai_similarity(search_text, candidate_text) AS semantic_similarity_score
FROM g15h_ai_similarity_source
ORDER BY
  semantic_similarity_score DESC,
  candidate_id

WITH g15i_ai_sentiment_source AS (
  SELECT
    review_id,
    review_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  review_id,
  review_text,
  ai_analyze_sentiment(review_text) AS sentiment_label
FROM g15i_ai_sentiment_source

WITH g15j_ai_fix_grammar_source AS (
  SELECT
    draft_id,
    draft_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  draft_id,
  draft_text,
  ai_fix_grammar(draft_text) AS corrected_text
FROM g15j_ai_fix_grammar_source

WITH g15k_ai_forecast_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_unit,
    event_date,
    revenue_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g15k_ai_forecast_observed AS (
  SELECT
    business_unit,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS ds,
    SUM(CAST(revenue_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS revenue
  FROM g15k_ai_forecast_source
  GROUP BY
    business_unit,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE)
)
SELECT
  ds,
  business_unit,
  revenue_forecast,
  revenue_upper,
  revenue_lower
FROM ai_forecast(
  TABLE(g15k_ai_forecast_observed),
  horizon => '<forecast_horizon_date>',
  time_col => 'ds',
  value_col => 'revenue',
  group_col => 'business_unit',
  prediction_interval_width => 0.9,
  parameters => '{"global_floor": 0}'
)

WITH g15l_vector_search_queries AS (
  SELECT
    search_request_id,
    search_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  q.search_request_id,
  q.search_text,
  search.*
FROM g15l_vector_search_queries AS q,
LATERAL (
  SELECT *
  FROM vector_search(
    index => '<catalog>.<schema>.<index_name>',
    query_text => q.search_text,
    num_results => 5
  )
) AS search
